name: @afenda/database
description: Canonical server-only PostgreSQL and Drizzle persistence boundary for Afenda.

scripts.db:guard: pnpm run typecheck && tsx scripts/guard-schema-modules.ts && tsx scripts/guard-composite-fk-unique-constraints.ts && tsx scripts/verify-schema-inventory.ts && tsx scripts/verify-002a-guideline.ts && tsx scripts/verify-hardening-patches.ts && vitest run src/schema/pkg-governance/__tests__ src/schema/ref/__tests__ src/schema/shared/__tests__ src/schema/tenancy/__tests__ src/queries/__tests__ src/7w1h-audit/__tests__ src/schema/__tests__ src/schema/constants/__tests__ src/schema/identity/__tests__ src/schema/helpers/__tests__ src/__tests__/hardening-patches.test.ts src/__tests__/002a-physical-inventory.test.ts
scripts.db:guard:ci: tsx scripts/guard-schema-modules.ts && tsx scripts/guard-composite-fk-unique-constraints.ts && tsx scripts/verify-schema-inventory.ts && tsx scripts/verify-002a-guideline.ts && tsx scripts/verify-hardening-patches.ts && vitest run src/schema/pkg-governance/__tests__ src/schema/ref/__tests__ src/schema/shared/__tests__ src/schema/tenancy/__tests__ src/queries/__tests__ src/7w1h-audit/__tests__ src/schema/__tests__ src/schema/constants/__tests__ src/schema/identity/__tests__ src/schema/helpers/__tests__ src/__tests__/hardening-patches.test.ts src/__tests__/002a-physical-inventory.test.ts
scripts.db:generate: pnpm run db:guard && drizzle-kit generate && tsx scripts/ensure-public-schema-in-baseline-migration.ts
scripts.db:ci: pnpm run db:guard:ci && pnpm run db:check-migrations && pnpm run db:verify-migrations-sync
